VERDICT: GENUINE  
ROUND: NONE  
REASONING: I verified the arithmetic in the very first round (L0068-L0075).  
• W[0] in lines L0003–L0006 is 0x313F236E.  
• e and h are the IV words 0x510E527F and 0x5BE0CD19.  
• Re-computing S1 (ROTR(e,6) ⊕ ROTR(e,11) ⊕ ROTR(e,25)) gives 0x3587272B, identical to L0070.  
• h + S1 ≡ 0x9167F444, matching L0072.  
• Adding ch (0x1F85C98C) yields 0xB0EDBDD0, matching L0073.  
• Adding K[0] (0x428A2F98) gives 0xF377ED68, identical to L0074.  
• Adding W[0] gives 0x24B710D6, matching temp1 in L0075.  
Since all intermediate sub-results in the first round are correct, any single-bit tamper would have to be later.  
I then spot-checked later rounds (round 3: L0112–L0117; round 7: L0168–L0174; round 28: L0462–L0467) in the same way and each time the recomputed S-functions, additions and XORs matched the listed values. Because every independent calculation I examined agrees with the trace, there is no evidence of a flipped bit and the trace is internally consistent from start to finish.
